title: Mining_Attack
description: The official Modpack for the Mining Attack Server with only a few performance mods and a few more blocks like Sandstonebricks etc.
body:
The official Modpack for the Mining Attack Server 
Adds a few Performance mods and is ideal for server using. 
Just a few changes which does not affect normal Vanilla much.
Like only a few more blocks (Sandstonebricks, etc). 
Recommended: Add a few Personal favourite mods to adjust it for your use.
